source_jobs.title: Customer Onboarding Manager - North America
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY:

As a Customer Onboarding Manager, you will play a key role in helping our customers unlock the full value of Leapsome’s People Enablement and HRIS platform from day one. You’ll guide our customers through the initial setup and configuration of the platform, ensuring a seamless technical implementation and adoption experience.

You’ll be responsible for managing onboarding projects from kick-off through to successful handover, working closely with HR and People teams, IT stakeholders, and senior managers at our client organizations. You will act as a trusted partner — delivering implementation support, driving admin engagement, and educating customers on best practices for setting up and using Leapsome. You may also deliver training sessions, especially for managers, to ensure confidence and clarity in using the platform.

This role requires a mix of technical problem-solving, project management, and stakeholder engagement. You’ll regularly harness AI-powered tools to deliver scalable and personalized onboarding experiences, create implementation resources, and identify opportunities to improve internal onboarding processes.

 


WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Leading the technical onboarding of new customers for both Leapsome’s People Enablement and HRIS

 - Project managing implementation timelines across multiple accounts simultaneously

 - Collaborating with customer stakeholders to tailor platform configurations to their workflows

 - Troubleshooting setup issues and coordinating with Product and Support teams where needed

 - Collaborating with your colleagues from Sales and Customer Success to achieve the best outcomes for our customers

 - Continuously improving onboarding processes by contributing to scalable content (e.g. guides, videos, templates)

 - Leveraging AI tools to personalize training materials and improve efficiency

 - Providing a smooth transition to Customer Success post-onboarding

 


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Depending on your entry level, you have between 2 - 4 years + of experience in a customer-facing onboarding, implementation, support, or customer success role, preferably in B2B SaaS

 - You are fluent in English

 - You have strong project management skills, having a track record of leading implementations involving multiple stakeholders is a plus

 - You’re an excellent communicator — clear, empathetic, and confident in working with both HR/People teams and technical audiences

 - You have a solid technical understanding and are comfortable navigating integrations, data imports, and troubleshooting configuration issues

 - You are organized and proactive, able to manage several onboarding projects at once while maintaining high attention to detail

 - You are comfortable delivering trainings to both small and large audiences, especially to help managers unde

source_jobs.title: Head of Growth Marketing and Lifecycle (d/m/f) NYC or Berlin
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!



Your Opportunity

Leapsome is looking for a Head of Growth & Lifecycle to architect and lead the engine behind our next stage of global expansion. Reporting to the VP of Marketing, you will join the Marketing Leadership Team to own the strategy and execution of our high-stakes demand engine. Today 95% of revenue is marketing led, and we’re looking for the leader to continue to lead and scale the function accountable for Sales Accepted Opportunities (SAOs), qualified pipeline, and customer expansion revenue.

We are looking for a strategic and hands-on marketing leader based in Berlin who wants to build a modern, AI-augmented growth engine to unlock our next phase of maturity. As we evolve from a people enablement tool to a comprehensive HR platform, your mission is to transform our buyer journey into a scalable, high-velocity machine.

You are a high-output, low-ego operator who leads with clarity, urgency, and empathy. You possess thehigh agency required to materially shift the growth trajectory of a category-defining company across North America and EMEA. You aren’t just an observer of the AI revolution; you are bullish on its potential to enhance human creativity and efficiency. You are constantly researching and experimenting with new ways to integrate technology—from autonomous workflows and predictive lead scoring to intent-driven prospecting—to drive superior, self-optimizing results.

This is a unique opportunity to shape global strategy while staying close to the execution of our demand engine across North America and EMEA. You will bridge the gap between initial acquisition and long-term customer retention, ensuring our marketing tactics match our expanding vision as a comprehensive HR platform.



WHAT ARE YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES?



 - Architect the AI-augmented Growth Engine: Reimagine marketing for the AI era by building automated, scalable growth loops across our entire tech stack tosupercharge efficiency, velocity, and ROI.

 - Own the Revenue & Pipeline Mandate: Take full accountability for the predictable delivery of Sales Accepted Opportunities (SAOs) and qualified pipeline. You will lead our high-stakes demand engine that fuels our global sales organization.

 - Design Market-Focused GTM: Lead go-to-market strategies tailored to SMB and Mid-Market segments, driving brand awareness and measurable revenue success in a competitive space.

 - Master the Full Buyer Journey: Bridge the gap between initial acquisition and customer expansion. You will build lifecycle programs that unlock upsell opportunities and drive long-term platform adoption.

 - Partner for GTM Excellence: Collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Customer Success to align marketing initiatives with roadmap priorities.

 - Lead and Empower a High-Performance Team: Mentor and grow a high-performing team of g

source_jobs.title: German speaking Sales Lead DACH (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!

Your opportunity:

As Sales Lead, DACH, you will own and scale one of Leapsome’s most strategic go-to-market motions. Reporting to the Global VP of Sales, you’ll lead and grow a Berlin-based team of Account Executives (High-Velocity/VSB, SMB, Mid-Market), starting with 4 AEs and expanding throughout 2026.

This is a true leadership role with full ownership of hiring, coaching, forecasting, and quota attainment. You’ll shape how we build a high-performance, AI-enabled sales engine in DACH — driving revenue growth and scaling our HRIS strategy in a core market.



What is your job?

 - Hire, Onboard & Coach a growing team of Account Executives in Berlin, initially starting at 4 team members

 - Own team quota performance, ensuring consistent pipeline growth, deal execution, and revenue delivery.

 - Hire, onboard, and coach on Sales fundamentals talent to build a high-performing, customer-centric sales team.

 - Drive productivity through process excellence, leveraging AI (automation, tools, and best practices) to enable your team to delight and partner with new customers in an increasingly scalable and efficient way. This is a core pillar of our strategy to grow impact and will be fundamental to the role.

 - Foster agility and adaptability in a dynamic environment, especially as we expand our HRIS offering in the market, which is a key pillar to Leapsome’s long-term growth.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Customer Success, RevOps, and Product to create a seamless customer journey and ensure feedback loops for continuous improvement.

 - Act as a culture carrier, bringing energy, clarity, accountability and innovation to your team while embodying Leapsome’s values.



Who are we looking for?

We’re open to both emerging and experienced sales leaders.

You may be:

 - An experienced Sales Leader with a strong track record of managing sales teams

or

 - A high-performing Team Lead / Sales Manager ready to step into a larger ownership role

 - Fluency in German and strong English skills

 - Experience in high-velocity and/or SMB sales (SaaS/B2B preferred)

 - Exposure to quota ownership and forecasting

 - A hands-on, coaching-first leadership style

 - Strong operational mindset and comfort with AI and automation

 - HR Tech experience is a plus, not required.



Benefits at Leapsome

 - Impact: Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for more than two million people by 2025

 - Teammates: Join a diverse and international team of talented, smart, and kind people

 - Feedback and recognition: We value feedback exchange and celebrating successes — big and small

 - Hybrid model: We encourage you to spend 2 days per week in our Berlin office (Tuesdays and Thursdays are our sponsored lunch days, where l

source_jobs.title: German speaking Product Support Specialist (d/f/m) - Berlin based
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


OPPORTUNITY:

Do you love solving complex problems and helping people succeed? Are you someone who naturally digs deep to find the root cause, communicates with clarity and empathy, and gets excited about using AI to work smarter?

We're looking for a German-Speaking Product Support Specialist to join our Berlin support team. You'll be the go-to expert for our German-speaking customers — diagnosing technical issues, answering product questions, and making sure every user gets the most out of Leapsome. You'll work closely with Support, Product, and Engineering teams, and play an active role in shaping how we deliver a world-class support experience.

This role is ideal for someone who's technically curious, loves learning how complex products work, and wants to grow in a fast-paced, AI-forward environment.




WHAT IS YOUR JOB?

 - Support German- and English-speaking customers via email with clarity, empathy, and technical depth

 - Own tickets end-to-end — from first response to resolution — ensuring timely and effective outcomes

 - Investigate and troubleshoot complex issues to identify root causes

 - Collaborate closely with Product and Engineering teams to surface recurring issues and drive fixes

 - Contribute to internal documentation, self-service resources, and ongoing process improvements

 - Run office hours to empower customers with product knowledge

 - Actively use and experiment with AI tools to optimize workflows, automate insights, and elevate support quality
   
   


WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

 - Technical curiosity and a fast learner mindset — you enjoy connecting the dots in a multifaceted product

 - Experience in customer support and technical troubleshooting (SaaS background is a plus)

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills in both German and English

 - Well-organized, proactive, and confident managing multiple priorities independently in a dynamic environment

 - An interest in conceptual work and the project management skills to turn ideas into action

 - A drive for continuous improvement — both for the customer experience and your own ways of working

 - Enthusiasm for using AI to work more efficiently and find new ways to support users



Our environment:

 - Open, collaborative, and feedback-driven culture

 - Our digital toolkit, including Leapsome, Zendesk, Notion, Slack, Zoom, and Google Suite, enables seamless remote collaboration.

 - We also enjoy meeting each other frequently in our office in Berlin Mitte, and get together with our NYC colleagues once per year at our company's offsite at a stunning location somewhere in Europe.



Benefits at Leapsome

 - Impact: Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for more than two million people by 2025

 - Teammates: Join a di

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative Outbound NA
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

We're building the SDR function at Leapsome from the ground up, and you'd be the third person on the team. That's a different job than joining an established sales org. There's no thick playbook waiting for you to follow. You'll help write it: what messaging works, which accounts to prioritize, what a good week actually looks like. If you want ownership over your process instead of a script to read from, this is built for you.



Our philosophy: we're AI forward. Automations handle the repetitive parts of prospecting, so you're not spending your day on manual busywork. Your job is to test what's actually working and add the human spark; the right tone, the right timing, the read on what a real person needs to hear.


Day to day, you'll research and reach out to HR and People leaders who could genuinely benefit from Leapsome, qualify them, and hand off strong opportunities to our AEs. We measure success in pipeline generated and meetings booked, and we're transparent about the career opportunities to grow your sales profession.

We want teammates who are curious about the people they're calling, competitive about hitting their number, and motivated to build something together rather than just follow the steps someone else laid out.

 


YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Research prospects and reach out with messaging built for their specific situation, not a generic template

 - Prospect into new accounts using a proven, repeatable methodology like calling, LI, email, or anything that gets the job done

 - Qualify outbound leads against a defined set of criteria

 - Partner with Marketing & RevOps on outbound campaigns to grow pipeline volume

 - Keep CRM accurate and current so the whole team can trust the data

 - Build real expertise in HR tech, and know where Leapsome wins against the competition


YOUR PROFILE

We’re committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. If you don’t meet every single requirement but feel excited about the role, we still encourage you to apply.



 - You're curious by default. You ask more questions than you answer, and you dig until you understand the "why," not just the "what"

 - You have a track record of setting a goal and hitting it, whether that's in sales, sports, academics, or a side project

 - You treat a "no" as information, not a setback, and you keep going

 - You’re structured and detail-oriented, with a passion for optimizing processes and making data-informed decisions

 - You have an interest in technology, AI, and are comfortable discussing tools and platforms with customers

 - Sales experience is a plus, not a requirement


BENEFITS:

 - Impact: Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for more than two million people by 2025

 - Teammates: Join a div

source_jobs.title: German speaking Product Marketing Intern (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!

What is your job?

As Product Marketing Intern, you’ll help us bring Leapsome’s story to life for the German market and beyond: building and translating the collateral our GTM teams rely on, and learning how AI can scale modern product marketing along the way.

 - Build and adapt core product marketing collateral: pitch deck slides, one-pagers, sales narratives, web copy, and campaign assets that GTM teams use every day

 - Translate and localize content for the German market with native-level quality, making sure tone, examples, and product proof points actually land for German buyers, not just survive Google Translate

 - Support GTM enablement: help prepare live training sessions, build and maintain process documentation, and keep our enablement library tidy and easy to find for Sales and CS

 - Use AI tools (Claude Cowork, internal AI agents, image and copy assistants) to scale content production without sacrificing brand voice, accuracy, or taste

 - Partner with Product, Sales, CS, and Brand & Content to gather product context, customer proof, and competitive insight, and then turn it into clear, on-brand assets

 - Take ownership of focused projects end-to-end: brief, draft, feedback rounds, launch, and a quick learning loop afterward
   
   

Who are we looking for?

 - Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Marketing, Communications, or a closely related field, available for a 6-month internship starting July 2026. If you have already completed an internship in a marketing related position, we would love to see your work

 - Strong storytelling, writing, and editing instincts, with a sharp eye for detail, in both German (native-level fluency required) and English

 - Foundational knowledge of how B2B SaaS products work and how strategic content drives the B2B buyer journey

 - A high degree of curiosity and an experimental mindset when it comes to leveraging AI tools for content and marketing workflows (ideally, you have experimented with tools like Claude, ChatGPT and image and copy tools)

 - Organized, structured, and self-driven. You like turning fuzzy briefs into shipped artefacts, and you keep process documentation up to date without being chased

 - Comfortable working in Berlin and coming to our office at least 2-3 days per week, and excited to join a team that ships fast, learns in public, and gives you real ownership early
   
   

Benefits at Leapsome

 - Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for more than two million people by 2025

 - Join a diverse and international team of talented, smart, and kind people

 - We value feedback exchange and celebrating successes — big and small

 - Enjoy our hybrid model by working from home or in our offices in the heart of Berlin, Germany

 -

source_jobs.title: Senior Test Automation Engineer/Software Development Engineer in Test (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!

Your Opportunity at Leapsome

Join a highly collaborative and product-focused engineering team that’s redefining how quality assurance integrates with software development. At Leapsome, QA is not a separate silo - it’s an integral part of the engineering process. As a Senior Test Automation Engineer/Software Development Engineer in Test, you will work closely with developers, product managers, customer success and designers to ensure every feature delivers exceptional quality and user satisfaction.

This role combines hands-on testing, automation, and innovative problem-solving. You’ll have the opportunity to drive automation efforts with tools like Playwright, screen and refine incoming tasks, and support scheduled release processes with manual testing where needed. Beyond this, you’ll play a key role in holding the engineering team to our quality standards, championing best practices, and exploring innovative approaches, such as leveraging AI in testing.



You will:

 - Drive the design and implementation of automation frameworks using tools like Playwright, ensuring scalable, reliable, and maintainable test coverage

 - Collaborate closely with engineers during the development lifecycle to identify edge cases and potential pitfalls early

 - Screen and refine incoming tasks, ensuring clear requirements and testability before development begins

 - Conduct exploratory testing for complex workflows and manual testing during scheduled release cycles to ensure seamless launches

 - Challenge engineers to uphold high-quality standards in code, functionality, and user experience, contributing to a culture of engineering excellence

 - Experiment with AI-driven testing approaches, identifying opportunities to enhance the speed and depth of QA processes

 - Monitor production systems and implement automated checks to maintain platform reliability and detect regressions proactively

 - Contribute to cross-functional projects, offering insights into testing strategies for smarter platform initiatives or AI-powered features

 - Document QA strategies and findings, fostering a learning environment and helping scale QA knowledge across the team
   
   

What is the Technology Stack?

 - Core Technologies: TypeScript, Node.js, Vue.js, and MongoDB for building scalable, maintainable, and high-performing applications

 - Automation Frameworks: Playwright, Vitest, and Mocha/Chai for comprehensive automated testing

 - Infrastructure: Docker, Github Actions and AWS for scalable CI/CD pipelines and production systems

 - Collaboration: GitHub, Notion, and async communication tools to work transparently with the engineering team

 - Analytics: Mixpanel, Sentry, and Datadog to track feature performance and identify issues

 - AI/LLMs: Leveraging modern AI technologies with LangGraph, multi-agent architectures,

Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

We’re looking for a Performance Marketing Specialist to help drive the next stage of our customer acquisition. In this role, you’ll be managing paid search and paid social campaigns, working across Google, Bing, Meta, LinkedIn, and more. You’ll be hands-on in building, optimizing, and scaling campaigns — using data to guide decisions while also contributing to the creative strategies that power performance. This role is a great fit for someone who enjoys working end-to-end: from writing and testing ad copy and creatives, to shaping full funnel media buying strategies. You’ll collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and have the opportunity to shape how we grow and engage with our customers.




WHAT IS YOUR JOB?

Media Buying

 - Hands-on keyboard experience with managing and optimizing paid campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, etc.

 - Experience in building out full funnel campaigns (Brand Awareness, Consideration, Conversion, Retargeting)

 - Write, test, and optimize ad copy, ensuring continuous performance improvement.

 - Demonstrated ability in managing paid media budgets, along with forecasting and budgeting for paid media channels.

 - Proficient in translating data into insights using tools like Google Analytics.

 - Work closely with Growth, Product Marketing, and Design teams to develop effective campaigns.

Creative Strategy

 - Lead the creative learning agenda, focusing on performance acquisition, creative strategy and development.

 - Write converting creative briefs for UGC creators and in-house Design teams.

 - Strong project management and communication skills to manage and direct static/video editing reviews, paying close attention to transitions, text placements, hooks, etc.

 - Drive continuous innovation by integrating creative performance insights, creative trends (both paid and organic), and customer insights.

 - Experience with conducting creative research through platforms like Ads Library, as well as, deep dive into customer research.

 - Curiosity to explore and apply AI tools for generative creatives, ad copy, and workflow improvements.




WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

 - 3+ years of experience working in a performance marketing team at a brand or agency, focusing on hands-on keyboard experience with paid search, paid social channels and creative development.

 - Professional working efficiency (B2 level minimum) in German with proven ability to write high-converting German ad copy and adapt campaigns for German-speaking audiences.

 - Passion for combining storytelling with data to create high-converting ad creatives.

 - Experience in directing creative teams, agencies, and UGC creators.

 - Knowledge of digital marketing technologies, media buying strategies, and how to impact performance marketing critical met

source_jobs.title: Senior Engineering Manager (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!

Your opportunity:

Join a lean, high-performing product engineering team that's reshaping the future of work. At Leapsome, we empower senior engineering leaders to drive impact through a unique blend of technical depth, strategic thinking, and people-first leadership.

As a Senior Engineering Manager, you'll take ownership of one of our People Enablement-focused cross-functional squads, responsible for core product areas such as reviews, goals, instant feedback meetings, learning management system, and calendar integrations. This is a high-impact role that goes beyond team delivery, you’ll help shape our workflows, scale our engineering culture, and mentor fellow Engineering Managers while contributing to cross-squad leadership topics.

We’re looking for someone who combines sharp technical instincts with a strong sense for people and product. You will code alongside your team, elevate engineers and leaders around you, and act as a multiplier for productivity, alignment, and innovation across the department. You’ll guide engineers toward thoughtful, scalable decisions emphasizing simplicity & maintainability instead of over-engineering, focusing on core user challenges with a strong product engineering mindset, and planning for long-term growth. You’ll champion a culture that values asking the right questions, challenging assumptions, and developing sound judgment across the team.



You will:

 - Lead, coach, and grow a team of highly capable engineers, supporting their career development, motivation, and performance

 - Own the technical strategy and delivery of HRIS modules, navigating complex workflows, compliance, and scale

 - Collaborate with Product, Design, Legal, and Leadership to ensure your squad delivers secure, scalable, and user-focused solutions

 - Stay hands-on and contribute code regularly, especially in moments of complexity, risk, or when unblocking the team

 - Drive architectural decisions, advocate for quality, and ensure consistent, pragmatic engineering practices

 - Guide engineers to avoid over-engineering, prioritize high-impact solutions, and foster sustainable, scalable decision-making

 - Encourage long-term thinking, clear trade-offs, and curiosity-driven problem solving

 - Evolve and improve our workflows, team structure, and use of tooling (incl. AI), with a focus on productivity and sustainability

 - Own communication with stakeholders, proactively aligning priorities, sharing context, and providing visibility into progress

 - Shape squad rituals, performance expectations, and decision-making frameworks, balancing autonomy with alignment



What is the technology stack?

 - Frontend: Vue.js, TailwindCSS, and a modern design system for a consistent, intuitive user experience

 - Backend: Node.js (TypeScript) with Express, MongoDB and NATS, built for scalab

source_jobs.title: German-speaking Account Executive SMB EMEA (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

Are you curious and eager to learn and grow? Looking for an opportunity to demonstrate and expand your skills in sales? Are you ambitious to create the best possible buyers’ experience? And, passionate to shape the future of work and continuous learning with us? Leapsome offers an exciting opportunity for driven and ambitious people to join our growing team in the heart of Berlin.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Full ownership and all the autonomy needed when it comes to the most critical steps of the sales cycle such as prospecting (including social selling), conducting platform demos, negotiating, and closing (including legal, data, and security).

 - Opportunity management (incl. Qualification using MEDDPICC).

 - Stakeholder Management/Relationship building.

 - Pipeline Management (incl. CRM data hygiene).

 - Accurate forecasting (incl. probabilities, priority, size, timelines, etc.).

 - Nurturing postponed/closed lost leads.

 - Being a product and industry expert (become/sustain needed for consultative selling).

 - Extracurricular activities (temporary assignments, e.g. OKR initiatives).




YOUR PROFILE

 - You hold a university degree and have 2 - 5 years of work experience in Sales (ideally in B2B SaaS) or a customer-exposed role, e.g., at a consulting firm.

 - You have a fluent/native level in German + fluency in English.

 - You excel at asking the right questions to understand a customer’s needs and decision process quickly, and you work with the customer to generate value for them.

 - You are AI-native, independently leveraging AI in order to maximise your ability to deliver a strong customer experience and streamline your internal process.

 - You are passionate about the future of work and continuous learning at work, and you want to join us in building an exceptional team and company to have a real impact in this space.

 - Bonus: You have previous experience in SaaS or HR tech, and/or organizational development, people development, or agility & digitalization.




BENEFITS

 - Impact: Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for more than two million people by 2025

 - Teammates: Join a diverse and international team of talented, smart, and kind people

 - Feedback and recognition: We value feedback exchange and celebrating successes — big and small

 - Hybrid model: We encourage you to spend 2 days per week in our Berlin office (Tuesdays and Thursdays are our sponsored lunch days, where lunch is provided by Leapsome).

 - Flexible work: Experience a work-life balance with flexible hours and the option of working elsewhere for up to 2 months per year

 - Learning and Development: Develop your skills with a yearly development budget of €2,000 and access to Good Habitz platform

source_jobs.title: High-Velocity Account Executive - North America
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!

Your opportunity:

Are you excited about making a real impact in a fast-paced sales environment, while being part of a supportive, purpose-driven team? Do you enjoy working with autonomy while contributing to a bigger mission? At Leapsome, we’re on a journey to shape the future of work, and we’re looking for curious, driven individuals who thrive in structured, high-energy environments and value continuous learning.

Join us as a High-Velocity Account Executive, where you’ll help small and growing companies unlock the power of their people.



What is your job?

You’ll own the full sales cycle for our high-velocity segment (companies with 10–49 employees), a fast-growing customer base with strong interest in our solution. Your mission is to identify and convert the right opportunities quickly and thoughtfully into delighted customers.

 - Own the sales process from first contact to closed deal: qualifying leads, running compelling demos, negotiating, and closing, all within a ~30-day sales cycle.

 - Manage a high volume of opportunities efficiently through a semi-automated, well-structured process.

 - Build trusted relationships with diverse stakeholders and tailor your approach to each customer’s unique context.

 - Prioritize effectively to focus on deals most likely to close and bring long-term value.

 - Collaborate with RevOps to continuously improve the sales process, using data and feedback to work smarter and boost win rates.

 - Maintain a clean pipeline with accurate forecasting, CRM hygiene, and clear timelines.

 - Contribute to smooth initial implementation for new customers.

 - Get involved in cross-functional projects (e.g. OKR initiatives) that align with your interests and support your growth.

 - Become a product and industry expert to guide customers with a consultative, value-driven approach.



Who are we looking for?

We’re committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. If you don’t meet every single requirement but feel excited about the role, we still encourage you to apply.

 - You have 1+ years of experience in a sales role (ideally B2B SaaS) or a client-facing position such as consulting.

 - You ask insightful questions, listen actively, and quickly understand what your customers need.

 - You’re structured and detail-oriented, with a passion for optimizing processes and making data-informed decisions.

 - You enjoy fast-paced work and are confident balancing efficiency with empathy.

 - You have an interest in technology, AI, and are comfortable discussing tools and platforms with customers.

 - Experience in HR tech, or fields like organizational development, people development, would be a bonus.



Benefits at Leapsome:

 - Impact: Become part of a fast-growing scale-up taking over the People Performance & Enablement space by making work fulfilling for mo

It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY:

As a Customer Onboarding Manager, you will play a key role in helping our customers unlock the full value of Leapsome’s People Enablement and HRIS platform from day one. You’ll guide our customers through the initial setup and configuration of the platform, ensuring a seamless technical implementation and adoption experience.

You’ll be responsible for managing onboarding projects from kick-off through to successful handover, working closely with HR and People teams, IT stakeholders, and senior managers at our client organizations. You will act as a trusted partner — delivering implementation support, driving admin engagement, and educating customers on best practices for setting up and using Leapsome. You may also deliver training sessions, especially for managers, to ensure confidence and clarity in using the platform.

This role requires a mix of technical problem-solving, project management, and stakeholder engagement. You’ll regularly harness AI-powered tools to deliver scalable and personalized onboarding experiences, create implementation resources, and identify opportunities to improve internal onboarding processes.




WHAT YOU WILL DO:

 - Leading the technical onboarding of new customers for both Leapsome’s People Enablement and HRIS

 - Project managing implementation timelines across multiple accounts simultaneously

 - Collaborating with customer stakeholders to tailor platform configurations to their workflows

 - Troubleshooting setup issues and coordinating with Product and Support teams where needed

 - Collaborating with your colleagues from Sales and Customer Success to achieve the best outcomes for our customers

 - Continuously improving onboarding processes by contributing to scalable content (e.g. guides, videos, templates)

 - Leveraging AI tools to personalize training materials and improve efficiency

 - Providing a smooth transition to Customer Success post-onboarding




WHO YOU ARE:

 - Depending on your entry level, you have between 2 - 4 years + of experience in a customer-facing onboarding, implementation, support, or customer success role, preferably in B2B SaaS

 - You are fluent in English and German

 - You have strong project management skills, having a track record of leading implementations involving multiple stakeholders is a plus

 - You’re an excellent communicator — clear, empathetic, and confident in working with both HR/People teams and technical audiences

 - You have a solid technical understanding and are comfortable navigating integrations, data imports, and troubleshooting configuration issues

 - You are organized and proactive, able to manage several onboarding projects at once while maintaining high attention to detail

 - You are comfortable delivering trainings to both small and large audiences, especially to help mana

Your Opportunity

As a Customer Success Manager you’re responsible for helping our customers achieve the best possible impact by using the Leapsome platform and for building and maintaining meaningful relationships with our customers. Master the challenges of growth and help us further shape our growth trajectory. You will focus on our mid-market customers.


What is your job?

Customer Relationship & Growth

 - Proactively manage customer relationships to minimize churn, identify expansion opportunities, and execute cross-selling strategies that align with customer needs while achieving commercial targets

 - Own customer renewals and drive net revenue retention across your book of business

 - Create the best SaaS customer experience, advise on HR best practices, and drive continued adoption

 - Support customers to rollout additional parts of the platform later and enable them to have the best possible impact by using Leapsome


CUSTOMER SUCCESS OPERATIONS

 - Monitor and improve customer success KPIs including NRR, GRR, customer health scores, adoption rates, and time-to-value

 - Work to make customer success processes and structures scalable as we grow

 - Leverage customer success platforms and CRM tools to track engagement and proactively identify at-risk accounts


PRODUCT & FEEDBACK LOOP

 - Gather feedback and user stories directly from our customers, come up with ideas to improve the product

 - Work closely with the product and engineering team to constantly improve the product (You actively contribute to our product roadmap!)

 - Build lasting relationships with our customers and help them build better companies
   
   

Who are we looking for?



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

 - University degree or equivalent work experience; 3+ years in Customer Success, Sales, Account Management, or a similar customer-facing role, ideally in a B2B SaaS company

 - Fluent in English and German, both in written and spoken form

 - Proven track record of managing customer renewals and driving net revenue retention

 - You are a people-person and curious to fully understand your counterpart

 - You excel at communicating complex processes in a simple way

 - You strive to provide outstanding customer experiences by effectively communicating the value and ROI of our solutions, ensuring customers recognize the impact on their business goals and objectives

 - You are process-driven and continuously work to improve existing processes

It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

Join a high-growth SaaS scale-up and shape how our GTM teams learn, ramp, and perform. As part of the GTM Enablement team, your main focus will be Customer Success and Account Management: the teams responsible for retention and expansion. But enablement at Leapsome is a cross-functional job, so you'll also support Sales and work on initiatives that span the whole GTM org. You'll build enablement the way it should work in 2026, with AI at the core of how knowledge gets created, shared, and put into practice. Please note this opportunity is a 1-year limited contract.




YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Develop and run enablement initiatives that make our CS Growth and CS Care teams measurably better at driving renewals and expansion

 - Build the structures (and the AI-assisted workflows behind them) that let the team scale: knowledge management, meeting formats, and initiative alignment across the GTM org

 - Own onboarding for new CS hires and cut ramp time with structured, AI-supported learning paths

 - Get deep into the Leapsome product and coach team members on real client calls, from call prep to feedback afterwards

 - Facilitate regular team workshops and trainings, and make sure learnings show up in day-to-day customer work

 - Maintain and evolve career development guidelines, skill frameworks, and organizational design across all CS levels and functions

 - Own projects that carry the Leapsome culture across GTM teams and locations

 - Manage stakeholders across Sales, Product, Marketing, and Ops to align on learning priorities, and jump in on Sales enablement where it moves the needle




YOUR PROFILE

You don't need to tick every box. If most of this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

 - 5+ years in enablement, L&D, CS, Sales, or a mix. What matters is that you've helped commercial teams get better at their jobs

 - A hands-on generalist: as comfortable facilitating a workshop as you are joining a client call, learning the product inside out, and coaching someone on how they ran the conversation

 - You design learning experiences around the people using them, and you communicate clearly at every level

 - Strong end-to-end ownership: you scope, design, execute, and maintain your projects rather than handing them off halfway

 - You work with AI tools daily and enjoy redesigning workflows around them, whether that's agent-supported onboarding or turning customer call insights into training content. Comfort with ops and data is part of that

 - An entrepreneurial mindset: impact-driven, agile, and unfazed when priorities shift

 - Fluent written and verbal English. German is a plus

 - Bonus points for HR tech or HR field experience, a solid grasp of the SaaS CS lifecycle, or account management and sales skills of your own.


BENEFITS

 - Impact: Become part

source_jobs.title: German speaking Senior Content Marketing Manager (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!


YOUR OPPORTUNITY

Germany is one of our most important markets, and one of our biggest content opportunities. We're looking for a Senior Content Marketing Manager who writes and thinks in German as naturally as they think in strategy: someone who can build a high-quality content engine for the German market, adapt Leapsome's global narrative to resonate locally, and drive our editorial presence with skill and ambition. This role sits at the intersection of content excellence and regional ownership. You'll lead editorial work for the German market, shape how we show up in German-speaking audiences' feeds, inboxes, and search results, and collaborate closely with global teams to bring localized programs to life.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Lead editorial for the German market. Own content planning, briefs, reviews, and publishing for German-language content, ensuring every piece is clear, compelling, and aligned with Leapsome's voice. You'll manage the full editorial process from ideation to distribution.

 - Tell Leapsome's story in German. Create and adapt high-quality content across formats including articles, landing pages, email sequences, social copy, webinar scripts, product messaging — that authentically represents Leapsome in the German market. You're not just translating; you're writing for a specific audience, with cultural fluency and editorial judgment.

 - Build a scalable, data-informed content engine. Help define the strategy, cadence, and structure that allow us to grow content quality alongside volume, from top-of-funnel awareness to deep thought leadership. You'll develop the workflows, templates, and briefs that keep the machine running smoothly.

 - Own SEO and AEO for the German market. Lead initiatives to grow our organic presence in German-speaking markets, combining technical SEO best practices with an understanding of how AI and search are evolving. You'll identify opportunities to scale visibility without sacrificing quality.

 - Champion AI for localization. Drive the use of AI tools and workflows to accelerate localization, content production, and experimentation, while keeping quality high. You'll test, document, and refine AI use cases that raise the bar across the team.

 - Support broader German market initiatives. Collaborate with global demand gen, product marketing, and campaign teams to ensure content feeds into multichannel programs — contributing to localized campaigns that drive awareness and pipeline in Germany.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have 5+ years of experience in German content marketing, ideally in B2B SaaS or HRTech, with a track record of driving results across awareness, engagement, and acquisition.

 - You possess a native-level fluency or bilingual proficiency in German with excellent editorial instincts and a strong command of copy across

We’re looking for a Paid Social & Search Specialist to help drive the next stage of our customer acquisition. In this role, you’ll be managing paid search and paid social campaigns, working across Google, Bing, Meta, LinkedIn, and more. You’ll be hands-on in building, optimizing, and scaling campaigns — using data to guide decisions while also contributing to the creative strategies that power performance. This role is a great fit for someone who enjoys working end-to-end: from writing and testing ad copy and creatives, to shaping full funnel media buying strategies. You’ll collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and have the opportunity to shape how we grow and engage with our customers.




WHAT IS YOUR JOB?

Media Buying

 - Hands-on keyboard experience with managing and optimizing paid campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, etc.

 - Experience in building out full funnel campaigns (Brand Awareness, Consideration, Conversion, Retargeting)

 - Write, test, and optimize ad copy, ensuring continuous performance improvement.

 - Demonstrated ability in managing paid media budgets, along with forecasting and budgeting for paid media channels.

 - Proficient in translating data into insights using tools like Google Analytics.

 - Work closely with Growth, Product Marketing, and Design teams to develop effective campaigns.

Creative Strategy

 - Lead the creative learning agenda, focusing on performance acquisition, creative strategy and development.

 - Write converting creative briefs for UGC creators and in-house Design teams.

 - Strong project management and communication skills to manage and direct static/video editing reviews, paying close attention to transitions, text placements, hooks, etc.

 - Drive continuous innovation by integrating creative performance insights, creative trends (both paid and organic), and customer insights.

 - Experience with conducting creative research through platforms like Ads Library, as well as, deep dive into customer research.

 - Curiosity to explore and apply AI tools for generative creatives, ad copy, and workflow improvements.




WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?

 - 3+ years of experience working in a performance marketing team at a brand or agency, focusing on hands-on keyboard experience with paid search, paid social channels and creative development.

 - Professional working efficiency (B2 level minimum) in German with proven ability to write high-converting German ad copy and adapt campaigns for German-speaking audiences.

 - Passion for combining storytelling with data to create high-converting ad creatives.

 - Experience in directing creative teams, agencies, and UGC creators.

 - Knowledge of digital marketing technologies, media buying strategies, and how to impact performance marketing critical metr

source_jobs.title: Staff Product Engineer (d/f/m)
source_jobs.description:
What is Leapsome?

Leapsome is the AI-powered people platform revolutionizing HR for modern teams. Leapsome drives HR excellence and empowers high-performing teams by automating, connecting, and simplifying every HR process across the employee lifecycle — from onboarding and performance management to engagement and development. Built with ease of use in mind, our platform ensures high adoption by employees, managers, and People teams alike.


Our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, and our vision is to reshape the future of work by being the leading People platform for HR excellence and high-performing teams. We enable companies to create environments where people can achieve their goals, learn and grow together, and build genuine motivation & engagement.


Trusted by thousands of organizations globally, Leapsome secured $60 million in Series A funding led by Insight Partners in March 2022. This funding allowed us to further develop our intelligent platform, create exceptional employee experiences, and expand into the US market.


It’s an incredibly exciting time to join Leapsome and be part of reshaping the future of work!




YOUR OPPORTUNITY:




Join a small and impactful engineering team that’s reshaping the future of work by building one people platform for high-performing companies. At Leapsome, our purpose is to make work fulfilling for everyone, helping companies create environments where people can achieve shared goals, build authentic relationships, learn, and grow together. We align product, engineering, and people in a single AI-powered HR platform, built to support fast-growing teams from startup to scale. We empower product engineers to take ownership of their work, contributing to the full lifecycle of our features, from ideation and discovery to development and iteration.



As a Staff Product Engineer, you will be a technical anchor for the team. You will help transition our platform from reactive tools to proactive workflows across the entire employee lifecycle. Guided by our vision, you will design intelligent systems that tap into user context across an interconnected tool stack to deliver a variety of features, AI and non-AI supported. You will build foundational context layers, robust security architecture, and autonomous agents that orchestrate complex processes, setting the standard for how humans and AI collaborate within our unified platform.






WHAT YOU WILL DO:



 - Strategic Technical Partnership: Partner with product and design as a technical peer - shaping scope, challenging assumptions, and influencing the roadmap to ensure our strategy solves real user problems.

 - AI & Agentic Architecture: Design and build robust, scalable applications, integrating LLM-driven agents and RAG pipelines capable of carrying out complex workflows autonomously across our entire platform ecosystem.

 - End-to-End Ownership: Own the end-to-end delivery of complex traditional full-stack features and multi-agent AI workflows. Make high-level architectural decisions that balance speed, scalability, and maintainability, building reusable, user-friendly full-stack components (including conversational and chat-based UI/UX) using Vue.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.

 - Security & Data Integrity: Architect secure data pipelines and robust access management systems to safely handle sensitive employee and company data across our interconnected toolstack.

 - Data-Driven Iteration: Analyze agent performance analytics, workforce insights, and process outcomes to refine features iteratively, ensuring our proactive triggers and nudges provide genuine business ROI.

 - Engineering Excellence & Mentorship: Ensure high-quality, reliable releases by contributing to robust testing, monitoring, and code review processes, while pioneering dedicated AI evaluation suites (evals), strict schemas for tool calling, and "human-in-the-loop" safety fallbacks. Drive organizational learning by providing mentorship and codifying standa

notes: High volume of sales and marketing roles, with some engineering positions. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
